description:
Hi,

The alarm app keeps reverting my 5:45 a.m. schedule back to 6:30 after a full charge. I rely on that early quiet window before the rest of the house is up. Device is an Android 13. Happy to send screenshots of the current settings.

Thanks,
Kelly West
subject: Alarm schedule keeps resetting

description:
Hi,

The new Breville drip coffee maker is pulling bitter on the hazelnut profile no matter the grind. Mornings start early and quiet, so I'd love to get this dialed in. Can someone walk me through a calibration reset?

Thanks,
Kelly West
subject: Coffee maker brewing bitter
